overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through a neon-lit downtown district at night. The scene features heavy traffic of futuristic vehicles with glowing underglow, a massive golden hexagonal-patterned building with intense yellow illumination, and wet streets reflecting the vibrant neon lights.

events.description: futuristic van with glowing underglow passes close by in front of the character

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk waiting for traffic to pass before crossing

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car with cyan and pink neon underglow driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive building facade with glowing golden hexagonal panels creating a honeycomb pattern
large concrete overpass structure with yellow railings spanning the intersection
modern building with illuminated windows and reflective glass facade
yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet asphalt reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a downtown intersection at night, waiting to cross. A massive golden hexagonal building dominates the right side while futuristic cars with neon underglow streak through the intersection. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant cyan and pink light trails from the passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: crossing the intersection and entering sidewalk

events.description: character begins walking forward across the crosswalk
character turns right onto the sidewalk alongside the golden building

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk and turning right onto the sidewalk next to the illuminated building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wet concrete sidewalk running alongside the golden building with yellow curb

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the intersection and turns onto the sidewalk beside the massive golden building. A pedestrian with red hair walks past in the opposite direction. The camera moves closer to the illuminated hexagonal facade, which now fills the right side of the frame with its intense golden glow.

events.description: UI popup appears indicating entry into Downtown district
passing a parked NCPD police car with glowing blue text on the street side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside the glowing golden building, passing other pedestrians and street furniture

notable_agents.action: parked NCPD police car with glowing cyan NCPO POL text on the side

entered.detail: large digital advertisement display projecting from the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the narrow sidewalk beside the massive golden hexagonal building, which creates a wall of warm yellow light on the right. The wet pavement reflects the illumination. An NCPD police car is parked on the street to the left, and holographic advertisements are visible on the distant buildings ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling neon intersection into the immersive golden glow of a massive architectural facade. It begins at a downtown crossing where futuristic cars with neon underglow streak across wet pavement, leaving vibrant cyan and pink reflections in their wake. As the character crosses the street and turns onto the sidewalk, the camera moves closer to a towering hexagonal building, passing a red-haired pedestrian while the intense yellow illumination begins to dominate the frame. The scene then shifts into a steady walk along a narrow path, where the building becomes a wall of warm light reflecting off the damp ground. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a parked NCPD police car on the left and distant holographic advertisements shimmering ahead in the night.
